code: import React from"react";import{Card,CardActions,CardContent,CardMedia,Button,Typography,Stack,Chip}from"@mui/material";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function CarCard(_ref){let{car,onReserve}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Card,{elevation:0,sx:{height:"100%",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",backgroundImage:"linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.01) 100%)",transition:"transform .18s ease, border-color .18s ease","&:hover":{transform:"translateY(-4px)",borderColor:"rgba(245,197,66,0.35)"}},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CardMedia,{component:"img",height:"190",image:car.imageUrl,alt:"".concat(car.make," ").concat(car.model),sx:{filter:"contrast(1.05) saturate(1.05)"}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CardContent,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Stack,{spacing:1,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Typography,{variant:"h6",children:[car.make," ",car.model]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Stack,{direction:"row",spacing:1,useFlexGap:true,flexWrap:"wrap",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Chip,{size:"small",label:"Year ".concat(car.year)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Chip,{size:"small",label:car.color}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Chip,{size:"small",label:car.engine}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Chip,{size:"small",label:"".concat(car.kmDriven.toLocaleString()," km")})]})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CardActions,{sx:{px:2,pb:2,mt:"auto"},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Button,{fullWidth:true,variant:"contained",color:"primary",onClick:()=>onReserve(car),children:"Reserve Track Experience"})})]});}
